case_title: RAMEY, EUGENE C vs. FOX & CARSKADON et al

DEFENDANTS ARE REQUIRED TO APPEAR UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTIFIED BY THE COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-26-1995, CONTINUED TO AUG-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO FILE POS, OR EXPLAIN TO COURT WHAT HAPPENED WITH THE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; IF DEFENDANT HAS BEEN PROPERLY SERVED, PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DEFAULT JUDGMENT BEFORE 8/25/95; CLERK WILL GIVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT; COURT BELIEVES MUNI COURT HAS JURISDICTION OF CASE.
